name: Robust Belief-State Policy Learning for Quantum Network Routing Under Decoherence and Time-Varying Conditions

description: arXiv:2509.08654v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Quantum network routing requires online decisions under probabilistic entanglement generation, finite quantum memories, decoherence, imperfect operations, and classical feedback, while the controller has incomplete knowledge of the physical state. This paper develops a robust belief-state routing framework based on a quantum partially ob...
author: Amirhossein Taherpour, Abbas Taherpour, Tamer Khattab, Mazen Hasna
